title: Nigerian Breweries Completes Acquisition of Distell Nigeria - FinancialEDGE
description: Nigerian Breweries Plc has complete the acquisition of 80% stake in Distell Wines and Spirits Nigeria Limited (Distell Nigeria). The acquisition aims to expand Nigerian Breweries' product offerings beyond beer to include wines, spirits, and flavored alcoholic beverages. -The deal aligns with the company's strategic objective to cater to diverse consumer needs and capture growth
html:
Nigerian Breweries Plc has complete the acquisition of 80% stake in Distell Wines and Spirits Nigeria Limited (Distell Nigeria).

The acquisition aims to expand Nigerian Breweries’ product offerings beyond beer to include wines, spirits, and flavored alcoholic beverages.

-The deal aligns with the company’s strategic objective to cater to diverse consumer needs and capture growth opportunities in the wines and spirits segment.

Nigerian Breweries will gain access to local production and importation of various brands from South Africa, including Amarula, Nederburg, and Scottish Leader.

The acquisition is expected to strengthen the organization’s manufacturing, marketing, and distribution capabilities, ensuring sustainable growth and value creation for stakeholders.
